title: user-access-diff inputs
description: Typed inputs for the user-access-diff runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

user_a.description: Example from AGENT.md: `alice@acme.com` OR `005XX0000012abc` Required column: 'yes'.

user_b.description: Example from AGENT.md: `bob@acme.com` OR `005XX0000034def` Required column: 'yes'.

include_field_permissions.description: Example from AGENT.md: `true` to include FLS-level diff (can be large) Required column: 'no (default `false`)'.

purpose.description: Example from AGENT.md: `"new-hire-parity"` | `"access-review"` | `"incident-investigation"` — shapes the Process Observations framing Required column: 'no'.
